brief_html: Received when a user is inviting you to create a new clan.
format:
(UINT32)   Cookie
(UINT32)   Clan tag
(STRING)   Clan name
(STRING)   Creator's username
 (UINT8)   Number of users being invited
(STRING)[] Usernames
remarks_html:
Received when a user is inviting you to create a new clan.

To accept or decline, you must respond with C>S 0x72 SID_CLANCREATIONINVITATION.
